ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., commercial, industrial) */,
  "facility_size" REAL /* Size of the facility in square meters */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was established */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last energy audit */,
  "energy_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility manager responsible for energy management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "energy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., Electricity, Gas) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the energy type (e.g., Joules, Kilowatt-hours) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy type (e.g., Grid, Solar) */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the energy type is renewable */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the energy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy system (e.g., Facility, Interior Lights) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "system_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the system */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the energy is consumed */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy system */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy type */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the energy consumption */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the energy consumed */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the consumption value is estimated */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter used to measure the consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("energy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_net" (
  "net_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net energy consumption record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy type */,
  "net_consumption_value" REAL /* Net value of energy consumption (production - consumption) */,
  "consumption_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the net energy consumption */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the net energy consumption */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the net consumption value is estimated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_net_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("energy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_net_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, energy analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy type */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Value of energy production */,
  "production_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the energy production */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the energy produced */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the production value is estimated */,
  "production_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production source (e.g., solar panel, generator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("energy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_efficiency_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy efficiency metric */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy efficiency metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the energy efficiency metric */,
  "metric_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the metric */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the metric value is estimated */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Internal Audit, Third-party Audit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_efficiency_metrics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy system */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the maintenance was urgent */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
